zh.The Great Church of St Mary, Sawbridgewo: 英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fiennes I於1330年2月2日出生在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟時，他的父親Sir John Fiennes II29歲，母親Maud Monceux24歲。他於1351年11月12日與Joan de Saye在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1359年享年29歲。

zh-hans.The Great Church of St Mary, Sawbridgewo: 英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fiennes I于1330年2月2日出生在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟时，他的父亲Sir John Fiennes II29岁，母亲Maud Monceux24岁。他于1351年11月12日与Joan de Saye在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1359年享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fiennes I was born on 2 February 1330, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John Fiennes II, was 29 and his mother, Maud Monceux, was 24. He married Joan de Saye on 12 November 1351, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1359, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fiennes I est né le 2 février 1330, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Fiennes II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud Monceux, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Saye le 12 novembre 1351, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1359, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fiennes I am 2. Februar 1330 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Fiennes II 29 und seine Mutter Maud Monceux 24. Er hat am 12. November 1351 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England Joan de Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1359 im Alter von 29 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Fiennes I è nato il il 2 febbraio 1330 nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Fiennes II, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Maud Monceux, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Saye il 12 novembre 1351, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1359, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.All Saints Church, Herstmonceux, Sussex,: イギリススセックスハーストモンセウックス
ja.The Great Church of St Mary, Sawbridgewo: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルス
ja.Herstmonceux, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスハーストモンセウックス
ja.lifeSummary: William Fiennes Iが1330年2月2日にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスで生まれた時，父Sir John Fiennes IIは29歳，母Maud Monceuxは24歳であった。1351年11月12日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスでJoan de Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年に29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Fiennes I(이)가 1330년 2월 2일 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Fiennes II(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Monceux(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1351년 11월 12일 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 Joan de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Fiennes I nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1330, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Fiennes II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud Monceux, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Saye em 12 de novembro de 1351, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1359, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fiennes I родился 2 февраля 1330 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Fiennes II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Monceux, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Saye 12 ноября 1351 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1359 г. в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Fiennes I nació el 2 de febrero de 1330, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Fiennes II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maud Monceux, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan de Saye el 12 de noviembre de 1351, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1359, a la edad de 29 años.
